steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Add the two equations to eliminate $y$.
$$(19)+(x-y)=(x+y)+9$$
A cleaner way is to rewrite the first equation as $x+y=19$, then add.
$$(x+y)+(x-y)=19+9$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the two equations and read the $x$-coordinate of the intersection. The answer is C.
